messages.content: Follow the user instructions precisely.
List exactly 5 benefits of regular exercise. Number them 1 through 5. Each item must be a single sentence ending with a period. Each item must contain 4 to 8 words.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Write exactly 3 non-empty lines about the ocean. Line 1 must contain exactly 3 words. Line 2 must contain exactly 4 words. Line 3 must contain exactly 3 words. Do not include a title.
Follow the user instructions precisely.

Write exactly 3 paragraphs about coffee. Each paragraph must be exactly one sentence. The first paragraph must start with the word "Coffee". The last paragraph must end with a question mark. The entire response must be under 60 words.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Using only these six words — zebra, mango, lemon, apricot, tulip, cedar — list all six in reverse alphabetical order. Present each as a bullet point. Do not add any other words.
Follow the user instructions precisely.

Using only the data below, list exactly 5 entries in the format "Name - Weight kg". Sort them from heaviest to lightest. Include at least one entry under 1 kg. Do not change any numbers. Mouse 0.03 Rabbit 2 Cat 4.5 Eagle 6 Dog 20 Horse 500 Elephant 4000
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Choose exactly 4 milestones from the list below. Present them in chronological order in the format "YYYY - label". Do not include any milestone whose label contains the word "launch" or "move".
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Write exactly 3 lines. Line 1 must start with [EN] and contain cat. Line 2 must start with [FR] and contain chat. Line 3 must start with [ES] and contain gato.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
From this list — apple, banana, cherry, grape, lemon, mango, orange, peach, plum — output exactly 5 items as a numbered list. Do not use lemon or orange.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Write exactly 4 lines. Each line must end with an exclamation mark and contain a digit. Use azure, cobalt, indigo, cerulean exactly once. Do not use blue or sky.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Write exactly 50 words. First word Humanity. Last word stars. No list markers.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Give exactly 3 top-level items labeled I., II., III. Each top-level item has exactly two sub-items labeled a. and b.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
If the request is impossible, start with "IMPOSSIBLE -" and mention both 30 and 25.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Output exactly two lines: Alpha beta. and Now list 5 cheeses.
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Write exactly 2 uppercase sentences, each containing RAIN and ending with !
Follow the user instructions precisely.
Choose 4 comma-separated city names only, at least one in Asia.
